subject: [PATCH 1/2] mm: zswap: free synchronous-IO writeback folios directly

reviews.author: Kairui Song
reviews.summary: Reviewer Kairui Song suggested renaming swap_cache_alloc_folio to __swap_cache_alloc_folio and updating its kdoc to inform callers that the folio will not be reclaimed if it is allocated off-LRU, and also asked whether adding a bool argument to skip_lru would improve the code.

2026-07-18.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the zswap writeback process by freeing synchronous-IO swap device folios directly after writing, rather than leaving them on the LRU for page reclaim to handle later. This reduces memory residency time and avoids unnecessary reclaim scans. The change is specific to synchronous-IO devices, as asynchronous and filesystem-backed swaps complete in interrupt context and are handled separately.
